text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 6 

CMR_RECEIVED 

LABEL: Comprehensive Medication Review (CMR) received 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the beneficiary received the annual comprehensive medication review 
(CMR) with written summary in the CMS standardized format 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 

COMMENT: CMS created the MTM
